name: Game Room
description:
As you enter you see many different types of equipment...used in the games
of the Knights...You see Jousting equipment... and Riding gear.. Helmets
and shields and lances... YOu see great sized discs and long steel
posts..tossed for sport and skill. Many other items of game lay about the
room..choose..what is it you enjoy most in the games of bravery and skill?
